cases.goal: debug this python payroll function and explain the fix
inspect the repo README and finish after reading it

env.ORCHESTRO_SUBPROCESS_COMMAND: bash -lc 'if printf "%s" "$ORCHESTRO_PROMPT_CONTEXT" | grep -q "Tool step"; then if printf "%s" "$ORCHESTRO_PROMPT_CONTEXT" | grep -q "COMMERCIAL-LICENSE"; then printf "{\"action\":\"final\",\"content\":\"saw README\"}"; else printf "{\"action\":\"final\",\"content\":\"missing README\"}"; fi; else printf "{\"action\":\"tool\",\"tool\":\"read_file\",\"argument\":\"README.md\"}"; fi'

cases.goal: investigate a failing local step and recover

env.ORCHESTRO_SUBPROCESS_COMMAND: bash -lc 'if printf "%s" "$ORCHESTRO_SYSTEM_PROMPT" | grep -q "Retry guidance from the last failed attempt"; then printf "debug recovered"; else printf boom >&2; exit 1; fi'
